summary: Iteration 21 Testing COMPLETED: Profile fixes including passport_id saving, profile activities, bio modal styling, iOS select fixes, and date field colorScheme. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified and working correctly.

issues: Console warning: In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option> - React hydration warning (non-blocking)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/member/me returns passport_id field
Backend: PUT /api/member/profile with passport_id saves correctly
Backend: passport_id persists after update (verified via GET)
Backend: GET /api/member/profile-activities returns activity log
Backend: Profile update creates activity records for changed fields
Backend: Biography update creates activity records
Backend: Activity records show old_value and new_value for updates
Backend: passport_id is in allowed fields for profile update
Backend: Multiple fields including passport_id can be updated together
Frontend: Membership Profile page loads correctly
Frontend: 'ID# (Passport or DNI or etc.)' label shows in view mode
Frontend: 'ID# (Passport or DNI or etc.)' label shows in edit mode
Frontend: passport_id input field exists and is editable
Frontend: Country/State/City selects have text-base class for iOS compatibility
Frontend: Date of Birth field has colorScheme:dark style
Frontend: View Full Bio modal opens correctly
Frontend: View Full Bio modal close button (X) is visible (white on dark bg)
Frontend: View Full Bio modal has bio-rich-content class for proper heading rendering
Frontend: Activities tab shows detailed field-level changes
Frontend: Activities show 'Added' (green) and 'Updated' (gold) actions
Frontend: Activities show old_value → new_value for updates
Frontend: MyEbank page loads correctly
Frontend: MyEbank date fields (Deposit Date, Target Date) have colorScheme:dark
Frontend: MyEbank Activities tab shows field-level changes
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warning about <span> inside <option> in select elements - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified all profile fixes: (1) passport_id field saves correctly via PUT /api/member/profile - was broken before, now fixed. (2) GET /api/member/profile-activities returns detailed field-level activity log with id, field, action (added/updated), old_value, new_value, timestamp. (3) Profile updates create activity records for each changed field. (4) Biography updates create activity records. (5) 'ID# (Passport or DNI or etc.)' label shows in both view and edit modes. (6) View Full Bio modal: close button (X) visible (white) on dark bg via [&>button]:text-white class, no horizontal overflow, bio-rich-content CSS class for proper h1/h2/h3/bold/italic rendering. (7) Select elements (Country, State, City, Gender) have text-base font-size (16px) for iOS zoom prevention. (8) Date fields in both MembershipProfile and MyEbank have colorScheme:dark for proper calendar styling.

profile_activities.returns: Array of activity objects with id, field, action, old_value, new_value, timestamp

bio_modal_fixes.rich_content: bio-rich-content CSS class with h1(2rem/bold), h2(1.5rem/semibold), h3(1.25rem/medium), bold, italic styles
